calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hanlen Chang for Sal Balistreri (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court noted that the Wells Fargo accounts appear on Schedule A and there is a typo on one account number, clarified that the correct account number ends in 6285, noted that the Comerica account does not appear on Schedule A and stated that is sees no basis to confirm the Comerica account an asset of the Trust. Mr. Chang stated that there no beneficiary designation, that Edward is the sole beneficiary and that Edward is the only person who has standing. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset as to all of the Wells Fargo accounts and denied the petition as to the Comerica account (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
